key_insight: A pretrained ANN encoder can be paired with a locally trained SNN classifier to deliver strong performance without end-to-end backpropagation.
engineering_relevance: This hybrid pipeline offers a biologically plausible and potentially more efficient route for deploying high-capacity perception models in downstream engineering and constitutive modeling workflows.
method: Use a pretrained EfficientNet as the ANN feature encoder.
Convert encoder activations into spike trains with rate coding.
Train the CoLaNET spiking classifier using local plasticity rules instead of gradient backpropagation.
evidence_signal: The abstract reports 99.09% accuracy on a 64-class ImageNet benchmark, indicating near-conventional deep-network performance.
watch_item: The approach depends on a pretrained ANN front end and rate-coding conversion, which may introduce integration and efficiency tradeoffs in real deployments.
paper_title: Hybrid ANN-SNN Pipeline with Local Plasticity
